name: Shark Steaks (Tiburon Encuritido Frito)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Or more of edible shark fill
1/4 cup Lime or lemon juice, or more
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the shark in the lime juice and salt for at least 1 hour.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet over moderate heat.
3. Drain the shark steaks well and fry them for 1 minute on each side.
4. Serve warm.
